summary: Classified the ten open PR inventory refs independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard. PR #88883 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive; the remaining PRs have specific unresolved proof, review, maintainer-signal, active-author, or technical-correctness gates that require human follow-up. Close/merge/fix/low-signal close paths are disabled or unsafe for this job.

actions.reason: Needs maintainer technical judgment and real behavior proof before any merge or close decision.
Actionable review-bot findings and proof failure require human or contributor follow-up; fix and merge are not allowed for this job.
Active author follow-up plus missing live macOS proof requires human follow-up.
Focused high-impact runtime change with proof requires maintainer technical review; this job cannot merge or repair it.
Maintainer rebase signal and proof failure block automation; fix and merge are disabled for this job.
Product/maintainer decision and rebase/proof gates require human follow-up.
Whether this is still needed versus already-landed recovery work is a technical correctness judgment; no close or fix path is enabled.
Focused message-delivery fix needs maintainer technical review; merge/fix/close actions are disabled.
Security-sensitive exact PR ref must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, merge, comment, label, or fix this item through ProjectClownfish.
Actionable review-bot findings require author or maintainer follow-up; low-signal closeout is disabled for this job.

needs_human: #88754: decide whether the normalization approach is acceptable after the CJK quote correctness concern and failed behavior proof.
#49750: resolve actionable Codex review findings and failed proof/check state before considering the Slack A2A routing fix.
#88823: determine whether maintainer-provided macOS/launchd proof is required or enough evidence exists to proceed.
#88828: maintainer technical review is required for the P1 gateway cron readiness change; this job cannot merge it.
#47589: maintainer follow-up is needed for Dependency Guard rebase and real behavior proof.
#51926: product/maintainer decision plus Dependency Guard rebase/proof are still unresolved.
#88192: maintainer must decide whether this diagnostic recovery PR is still unique after #86056/#91840.
#88850: maintainer technical review is needed for the Teams attachment threading fix and broader check failure.
#48396: author or maintainer must address wrong-field preview and committed planning-doc review findings.
